_meta.feature: action-item extraction into the persistent task list (#1605, PR #1917)
_meta.labeling_policy: One expected item per sentence that asks the principal to do something concrete. 'description' is the sentence verbatim as written in the body (the extraction contract is sentence-granular); 'due_hint' is the 'by <when>' phrase verbatim when present, else null; 'type'/'url' follow the ActionItem contract ('link' when the ask is to follow a URL in the same sentence). Pleasantries, conditional if-you-need-it guidance, and boilerplate ('Please note...', 'No action required') are NOT action items — several such cue-trap cases are labeled expected:[] on purpose to measure false positives. Cases ai-014..ai-016 phrase real asks without the extractor's cue words on purpose, to keep recall honest.

ai-001.subject: Q3 budget spreadsheet
ai-001.body: Hi Sam, hope the offsite went well. Please send me the Q3 budget spreadsheet by Friday. Thanks, Priya

expected.description: Please send me the Q3 budget spreadsheet by Friday.

ai-001.rationale: Single explicit ask with a due phrase.

ai-002.subject: Two things before sprint kickoff
ai-002.body: Hey team, two things before the sprint kicks off. Can you review the onboarding doc before Thursday's sync? Also, please confirm your attendance for the offsite by EOD. Cheers, Dana

expected.description: Can you review the onboarding doc before Thursday's sync?
Also, please confirm your attendance for the offsite by EOD.

ai-002.rationale: Two independent asks in one email; only the second has a 'by' due phrase.

ai-003.subject: v2 design ready for review
ai-003.body: Morning! The v2 design is ready. Please review the design doc at https://docs.example.com/design/rev2 and leave comments inline. We want to lock scope this week.

expected.description: Please review the design doc at https://docs.example.com/design/rev2 and leave comments inline.

ai-003.rationale: Link action: the ask is to follow the URL and review.

ai-004.subject: Team dinner next week
ai-004.body: We're hosting a team dinner at Luigi's next week. RSVP by Monday so we can get a headcount. Partners welcome.

expected.description: RSVP by Monday so we can get a headcount.

ai-004.rationale: RSVP request with a due phrase.

ai-005.subject: Expense report reminder
ai-005.body: This is a reminder from Finance. Kindly submit your expense report by 5pm on Thursday. Late submissions roll to the next cycle.

expected.description: Kindly submit your expense report by 5pm on Thursday.

ai-005.rationale: Deadline ask; the due phrase is the clock time, as the contract's free-text hint.

ai-006.subject: Vendor follow-up from standup
ai-006.body: Quick note from today's standup. Please follow up with the vendor about the delayed GPU shipment. It's blocking the lab bring-up.

expected.description: Please follow up with the vendor about the delayed GPU shipment.

ai-007.subject: 1:1 moved
ai-007.body: I moved our 1:1 to Wednesday at 10am. Let me know if the new time works for you. Calendar invite updated.

expected.description: Let me know if the new time works for you.

ai-007.rationale: A reply is requested — a real ask even though phrased conditionally.

ai-008.subject: Action required: VPN credential rotation
ai-008.body: Action required: rotate your VPN credentials before the security deadline on March 3. Accounts that miss the deadline will be locked.

expected.description: Action required: rotate your VPN credentials before the security deadline on March 3.

ai-008.rationale: Mandatory task; 'before March 3' is not a 'by' phrase so due_hint stays null under the contract's free-text 'by' convention.

ai-009.subject: Contract redline
ai-009.body: Thanks for drafting the contract so quickly. Could you send the updated redline to legal for review? They need it before signature.

expected.description: Could you send the updated redline to legal for review?

ai-009.rationale: Single ask; surrounding sentences are context, not tasks.

ai-010.subject: Q3 workshop headcount
ai-010.body: Planning for the Q3 workshop is underway. Reply by Thursday with your headcount estimate and dietary needs. Agenda to follow.

expected.description: Reply by Thursday with your headcount estimate and dietary needs.

ai-010.rationale: Reply-by ask with a due phrase.

ai-011.subject: Release checklist — three items
ai-011.body: Hi all, wrapping up the release checklist. Please update the CHANGELOG for your components. Can you confirm the installer smoke test passed on your machine? Finally, send me the signed-off test matrix by tomorrow. Thank you!

expected.description: Please update the CHANGELOG for your components.
Can you confirm the installer smoke test passed on your machine?
Finally, send me the signed-off test matrix by tomorrow.

ai-011.rationale: Three distinct asks in one email — set matching must credit each independently.

ai-012.subject: Q3 review survey
ai-012.body: One last thing for the quarter. Can you fill out the survey at https://forms.example.com/q3-review?team=eng before you leave today? It takes about three minutes.

expected.description: Can you fill out the survey at https://forms.example.com/q3-review?team=eng before you leave today?

ai-012.rationale: Link action whose URL carries a query string; 'before you leave today' is not a 'by' phrase.

ai-013.subject: Garage repaint this weekend
ai-013.body: The parking garage will be repainted this weekend. Respond by Friday with your parking preference. Assignments go out Monday.

expected.description: Respond by Friday with your parking preference.

ai-013.rationale: Respond-by ask with a due phrase.

ai-014.subject: Missing NDA
ai-014.body: Hi Ravi, the auditors flagged the missing NDA. I need the signed NDA back before Thursday. The rest of the packet looked fine.

expected.description: I need the signed NDA back before Thursday.

ai-014.rationale: Real ask phrased as 'I need X' — deliberately outside the extractor's cue list, to measure recall on non-imperative phrasing.

ai-015.subject: Slides for the sales team
ai-015.body: Great progress this sprint. It would help a lot if you shared the final slide deck with the sales team tonight. They present tomorrow at 9am.

expected.description: It would help a lot if you shared the final slide deck with the sales team tonight.

ai-015.rationale: Polite indirect request — a real, time-sensitive ask without imperative cue words.

ai-016.subject: Staging goes down at noon
ai-016.body: Heads up — the staging environment goes down at noon. Make sure your feature branches are pushed before then. Ping infra if anything looks stuck.

expected.description: Make sure your feature branches are pushed before then.

ai-016.rationale: 'Make sure ...' is a required task without cue words. 'Ping infra if anything looks stuck' is conditional guidance, not a task — deliberately unlabeled.

ai-017.subject: Maintenance window tonight
ai-017.body: Maintenance window tonight from 1-3am UTC. No action required — sessions will reconnect automatically. Status page will track progress.
ai-017.rationale: Cue trap: contains the literal phrase 'action required' while explicitly requiring nothing — measures false positives on boilerplate.

ai-018.subject: Ticket #8123 resolved
ai-018.body: Your ticket #8123 has been resolved. Please note that this mailbox is not monitored. Open a new ticket if the issue returns.
ai-018.rationale: Cue trap: 'Please note ...' is boilerplate, not a task; reopening is conditional guidance.

ai-019.subject: March engineering newsletter
ai-019.body: Welcome to the March engineering newsletter. This month we shipped the new NPU scheduler and cut inference latency by 18%. Read on for team highlights and upcoming talks.
ai-019.rationale: Hard negative: newsletter, nothing asked of the reader.

ai-020.subject: Your order has shipped
ai-020.body: Your order #4821 has shipped. Estimated delivery is Tuesday, March 12. Track your package in the app.
ai-020.rationale: Hard negative: transactional receipt; tracking is optional, not a task.

ai-021.subject: Out of office
ai-021.body: I am out of the office until Monday, June 9, with limited email access. For urgent build issues, contact Maya Chen. I will respond when I return.
ai-021.rationale: Hard negative: auto-reply; the contact line is conditional routing, not an assigned task.

ai-022.subject: All-hands room change
ai-022.body: FYI — the all-hands moved to the main auditorium. No agenda changes. Recording will be posted afterwards.

ai-023.subject: Good seeing you!
ai-023.body: It was great catching up at the conference last week! The keynote on chiplet packaging was fantastic. Say hi to the team for me.
ai-023.rationale: Hard negative: personal pleasantries; 'say hi' is not a task worth tracking.

ai-024.subject: Nightly backup report
ai-024.body: Nightly backup completed successfully at 02:14 UTC. 412 GB archived to cold storage. No errors reported.

ai-025.subject: Security review signed off
ai-025.body: Thanks for turning the security review around so quickly. Everything is signed off on our side. Great work this quarter.
ai-025.rationale: Hard negative: thank-you that mentions a past review — must not become a task.

ai-026.subject: Flash sale this weekend
ai-026.body: Flash sale: 30% off all monitors this weekend only. Use code SAVE30 at checkout. Offer ends Sunday at midnight.
ai-026.rationale: Hard negative: promotional mail; marketing imperatives are not the principal's tasks.
